differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
Metastatic carcinoma (e.g., from lung or renal primary)
Primary mediastinal B-cell lymphoma with secondary cardiac involvement
next_steps: 18F-FDG PET-CT to evaluate systemic metabolic activity and identify optimal biopsy site
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided (EBUS) biopsy of mediastinal lymph nodes for histopathology and flow cytometry
Pericardiocentesis with analysis of fluid for cytology, flow cytometry, and immunohistochemistry
Cardiac MRI for tissue characterization and to delineate the extent of intramyocardial invasion
Cardiac biopsy (transvenous or surgical) if less invasive sampling remains non-diagnostic
